cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 我们这周六想去古镇住一晚，两个人，想找氛围好一点的客栈，有什么方向可以先看？

mustInclude: anchor the reply in dates, guest count, and room mood preference
guide toward a clear next step without hard selling

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 今晚可能要十一点多才到，客栈还能办入住吗？

mustInclude: state that handling depends on the specific property and arrival window
guide toward property and timing details
mustAvoid: guaranteeing that someone will wait no matter what
ignoring the host-led nature of inns

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 带老人和两个大箱子过去，能不能直接把车停到客栈门口？

mustInclude: ask for the specific property and whether parking or stairs is the main issue
mustAvoid: treating every inn as equally easy to access

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 第一次订客栈，想安静一点，有浴缸或者景观会更好，怎么选比较稳？

mustInclude: use quietness and room-style preference to narrow the route
invite the next key facts naturally
mustAvoid: overwhelming the user with a full room list
